3100940.name: Hyperacusis
3100940.description:
Hyperacusis is a first person survival horror game where you are an urban explorer that snuck into an abandoned hospital for the content but little did you know that you are not alone.

Hyperacusis sets you in a hospital with a monster that is hyper sensitive to sound, you will have to find a way to escape the place, use the environment to hide from the monster, or distract him with sounds. you will have to be cautious with the surrounding environment as there are many things that can make sounds and alert the beast!

Features:

Survival Horror Elements:

  • ◉ Realistic Graphics

  • ◉ Hiding Mechanics, Distracting

  • ◉ Horrifying Monster AI

  • ◉ Unique Phone Camera/Flashlight Mechanic

  • ◉ Puzzles
3100940.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
